tasks.subject: Task 1: Tighten cue path-safety check
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace strings.Contains(rawName, "..") in cue.go with explicit equality against "." and ".." so legitimate filenames containing ".." parse while path traversal stays blocked.

**Files:**
- Modify: cue.go (line 86, ParseCue FILE arm)
- Modify: cue_test.go (extend TestParseCueAccepts with dotdot-in-name; extend TestParseCueRejects with dot-name and dotdot-name)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- F.E.A.R..bin parses with Track.Filename == "F.E.A.R..bin"
- "." rejected
- ".." rejected
- existing accept/reject sub-tests unchanged
- go test ./... passes

**Verify:** go test -run TestParseCue -v ./...

```json:metadata
{"files": ["cue.go", "cue_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "go test -run TestParseCue -v ./...", "acceptanceCriteria": ["F.E.A.R..bin parses", "'.' rejected", "'..' rejected", "existing sub-tests still pass", "go test ./... passes"]}
```
